campbell.title: Campbell City Council — May 19, 2026
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council met to discuss staffing challenges, including open positions and efforts to recruit and retain employees. The council also addressed an upcoming Boogie Festival happening this weekend.
keyTopics: Staffing vacancies and recruitment/retention efforts
Public hearing on government code section 3502
Boogie Festival this weekend
Housing security issues

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — May 6, 2026
saratoga.summary: The Saratoga City Council approved financial reports and set up a public hearing process for an upcoming ordinance scheduled for final adoption on May 20th. The council also discussed whether the city should explore becoming a charter city and reviewed preliminary estimates for potential new tax options.
keyTopics: Engineer's Report for fiscal year 2026 approved
Public hearing scheduled for ordinance (final vote May 20)
Charter city status being evaluated
Preliminary tax options and revenue estimates presented to council

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos Town Council — May 19, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos Town Council met on May 19, 2026, to approve meeting minutes, review the town's finances for March, and authorize several contracts and agreements. The council approved donations of safety equipment, a five-year service agreement, a paving construction contract, and grant applications for a statewide project.
keyTopics: Approved O'Grady Paving construction contract
Accepted donation of Automated External Defibrillator (AED)
Reviewed March 2026 financial and investment report
Authorized grant applications for statewide project
Adopted project list for Fiscal Year 2026-2027

san-jose.title: San José City Council — May 20, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council held a meeting to plan upcoming council sessions. They cancelled their May 26 meeting and reviewed the draft agenda for June 2, including decisions about which items need specific time slots and any special notice requirements. The council also updated work plans for neighborhood services and government operations.
keyTopics: May 26 council meeting cancelled
June 2 draft agenda review and scheduling
Neighborhood Services and Education Committee work plan update
Rules and Open Government Committee work plan update
Event approvals sponsored by council members

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — May 20, 2026
mountain-view.summary: The Mountain View City Council met on May 20, 2026 to approve meeting minutes, hear public comments, and select new members for the Youth Advisory Committee for the 2026-27 fiscal year. The council also reviewed upcoming agendas for various city boards and commissions.
keyTopics: Youth Advisory Committee member selection and appointments for 2026-27
Public comment period on city matters
Meeting minutes approval
Upcoming board and commission agendas

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — May 19, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The City Council held a budget workshop to discuss Sunnyvale's spending plan for fiscal year 2026/27. Residents had the opportunity to comment on the proposed budget before the council makes final decisions.
keyTopics: Fiscal year 2026/27 budget proposal now available for public review online
Public comment period on the city's spending plans
Budget workshop discussion and council review

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — May 19, 2026
cupertino.summary: The Cupertino City Council met to update the city's Health and Safety Element, a long-term planning document covering 2015-2040. The council also recognized the Public Works Department for their work on infrastructure, transportation, and environmental programs during Public Works Week, and celebrated Asian American Pacific Islander Month.
keyTopics: Update to Health and Safety Element of the General Plan (2015-2040)
Recognition of Public Works Department divisions (roads, sidewalks, trees, fleet, facilities)
Celebration of Asian American Pacific Islander (AAPI) Month

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — May 21, 2026
santa-clara.summary: The Santa Clara Station Area Task Force held a special meeting on May 21, 2026, to discuss plans and issues related to the station area. The meeting was held in person at City Hall and available online via Zoom for residents to participate.
keyTopics: Station Area Task Force special meeting convened
Meeting held at City Hall Council Chambers (1500 Warburton Avenue)
Hybrid format: in-person and Zoom attendance available

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — May 19, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council held a meeting on May 19, 2026 where they approved a new city manager and discussed several land development permits and zoning changes. The council conducted public hearings on new ordinances and assessed property-related matters.
keyTopics: Appointed a permanent City Manager
Approved a site development permit and tentative map amendment
Introduced new zoning ordinances (urgent and standard measures)
Confirmed assessments related to property matters

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — May 15, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The Palo Alto City Council discussed plans to help residents switch from gas to electric heating and appliances to meet new air quality regulations. The council reviewed proposed principles and guidelines for electrification programs that would support this transition.
keyTopics: Residential electrification program guidelines and principles
Compliance with Air District regulations requiring switch from gas to electric
Status update on city's electrification efforts
